  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Semme trihzebs
no Brafschkeschanas/ kad Babel-
le taps usneinta/ un ta Brehk-
schana taps dsirdeta starp teem
Bagauteim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta LI. Nodalla.
Weena Upstiprinachana tahs pirmajas Slud,
dinajchanas/ ka Babele taps ispohtita/ un
tee Judi atkahks: 1. etc. Zaur Dee,
wa neismehtrojamu Wiss Spehzibu. 15. Un
zaur weenu Sihmi / kas Serajum dohta
irraid: 59.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. �a taka tas KUNGS:
Reds/ Es zelschu weenu
famaitajamu Wehju
prett Babeli/ un prett teem/ kas
winno Widdii dsihwo/ kas prett
mannim zettahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Un es fuhtischu Babelei
Wehtitajus/ kas tohs wehtihg/
un winnas Semmi istukschohs/
jo tee buhs Nelaimibas Deena
wiffsapfahrt prett winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Kai Strehlnecks prett
Strehlneeku to Stohpu usweik/
un prett to/ kas eeksch farwahm
Kruhychu Brunnnahm leppo. Un
ue faudseet winnas Jaunektus/
tsdeldeet winnu winnas Spehku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Ka tee Nokautee friht eeksch
tahs Kaldeeru Semmes/ un tee
Nodurtee us winnas Eelahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Jo Israels un Juhda ne
taps eeksch Atraitnibas painesti
no fawa Deewa ta KUNGS Adeli/ ka winsh to famaita /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Behdseet no Babeles Wi-
dus/ un isglahbeet ikkatrs fam-
Dwehseli/ ka juhs bohja ne eet-
eeksch winnas Noseeguma /
schis irr tas Latks tahs Atree-
schanas ta KUNGA/ kas winn
to Nopelzu makfa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Babele bija weens Sel-
Bitteris ta KUNGA Rohka
kas wiffu Semmi peedsrdinaj-
tee Pagani irr no winnas Wi-
nu dsehruschi/ tapehz irr tee Pa-
gani ta trakkojschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Babele irr peepefschi kritt
fi un fatreehta. Rauzeet pa-
winnu jemmeet Salwes preek-
winnas Wahtim/ jascha ta ta-
dseedinata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Mehs dseedinajam Bal-
li / bet ta ne irr sadshjust. Va-
stahjeet winnu/ un eima ikkat-
fava Semine/ jo winnas So-
diba tneedsahs lihos patt Deb-
fim/ un atsneeds tahs augst-
kas Padebbesis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tas KUNGS irr mu-
fu Taisnibu preefscha neffi-
nahzeet / laid mehs isteiz-
eeksch Zianns to Darbu ta Ku-
GA muhsfu Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Schlibstajt tahs Bulta-
darrajt tahs fedsamas Brunn-
pahrpillam gattawas / t-
KUNGS ir to Garru to M-
dern Rehnizo skubbinajes/ jo wi-
na Apneinschana irr prett B-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
